Investing /
Online Investing /
Self-Directed Investing

Self-directed investing

Complete freedom for the hands-on investor

Take control of your financial future with $0 commissions,1 no annual fees and up to a $100 cash bonus for Smart Rewards® members.3,4

Open an account now

Keep more of what you earn

Maximize your investment potential by minimizing costs. A self-directed investing account provides the flexibility to trade on your terms with pricing designed for growth.

Enjoy $0 commissions1 on online stock and ETF2 trades.

Pay no annual account fees.

Start immediately with no minimum investment required.


Up to $100 cash bonus

For a limited time, Smart Rewards® members can earn up to a $100 cash bonus when they open a new Self-directed investing account and meet qualifying activities.3A U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account4 from our affiliate, U.S. Bank, is required to earn Smart Rewards.

  • Invest $1,000 – $9,999 to get a $50 cash bonus.
  • Invest $10,000 or more to get a $100 cash bonus.
Open an account now

Next generation Investing

Invest anytime, anywhere

Stay connected to the markets whether you're at home or on the go. An integrated digital experience puts the power of the stock market right in your hands.

  • Trade directly online or through the U.S. Bank mobile app. 
  • Securely view all your accounts on a single, consolidated digital dashboard.
  • Make informed decisions using powerful cutting-edge tools, interactive charts and detailed reports.

Build a portfolio that fits your goals

Every financial journey is unique. Select the specific assets and account types that align with your life stage and the future you want to pursue.

  • Choose from a wide range of investment options including stocks, bonds, ETFs, mutual funds and options.
  • Select the account type that best aligns with your financial strategy.
  • Plan for retirement with a Traditional IRA, Roth IRA or SEP IRA.

How to start investing

Step 1

Choose an account type

Decide which investment account aligns best with your financial goals.

Step 2

Fund the account

Transfer funds easily to get started with no minimum investment required.

Step 3

Start trading

Use intuitive tools to build and manage your portfolio online or via the mobile app.

Open an account now

Self-directed investing is only available to current clients of U.S. Bancorp Advisors and its affiliate U.S. Bank. Not yet a client? We’re here to help you get started—give us a call at 866-758-8655.

Invest in the next generation with custodial accounts

Help the children in your life build a strong financial foundation. Custodial accounts allow you to manage investments on behalf of a minor, giving them a head start on their financial journey.

Contact us to learn more or to open a custodial account. After the account is set up, you can easily trade and manage it online.

Call 866-758-8655

Looking for professional guidance to manage your investments?

Partner with a team of experienced financial advisors to craft a personalized financial plan tailored to your unique goals. Using a collaborative approach and advanced wealth planning technology, we’ll simplify your investment decisions and help you stay on track.

  • Tailored support: Work with a team of advisors who create strategies aligned with your financial needs.
  • Flexible access: Connect with us on your terms—via phone, email or video.
  • Collaborative investing: Simplify your financial life while making your investments work harder for you.
Work with a team of advisors

Frequently asked questions

Get answers to your self-directed investing questions. Start here or view all FAQ.

There is no minimum amount required to open an account. You pay $0 commissions for online stock and ETF trades and there are no annual account fees. Find more fee information on the self-directed fees page.

Yes. You can easily trade, monitor your portfolio and access research tools through the mobile app.

You can trade stocks, ETFs, mutual funds, bonds and options directly online.

Custodial accounts, like those under the Uniform Transfers to Minors Act (UTMA) or Uniform Gifts to Minors Act (UGMA), are investment accounts you can open for a child. You can contribute funds and manage the investments as the custodian, but the minor is the legal owner of the assets. Once the child reaches the age of majority, which varies by state, they gain full control of the account.

Smart Rewards members with a U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account from our affiliate U.S. Bank can earn a bonus by opening a new self-directed investing account. Invest $1,000 to $9,999 for a $50 bonus or $10,000 or more for a $100 cash bonus.

Get rewarded for investing in your future.

Up to $100 cash bonus for Smart Rewards® members who invest in a new self-directed investing account.3,4

Open an account

Take the next step

Open an account
Call 866-758-8655
Start of disclosure content

Disclosures

Please refer to our disclosures and agreements.

Start of disclosure content
Footnote
Return to content, Footnote

  1. No trading fees applies to online equity trades, exchange traded funds (ETFs), closed-end funds and no-load mutual funds. For options, there is a fee of $4.95 per order, plus $1.00 per contract. Mutual funds with sales loads are subject to applicable sales charges according to the prospectus. Find out more about fee information on our self-directed brokerage fees page.

  2. Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) are subject to risks similar to those of stocks, such as market risk. Investing in ETFs may bear indirect fees and expenses charged by ETFs in addition to its direct fees and expenses, as well as indirectly bearing the principal risks of those ETFs. ETFs may trade at a discount to their net asset value and are subject to the market fluctuations of their underlying investments.

  3. This offer is valid for clients who are 18 years or older and have a U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account and are enrolled in U.S. Bank Smart Rewards® from our affiliate U.S. Bank, who open a new U.S. Bancorp Advisors Self-directed investing account and add net new assets of at least $1,000 into the new account within 30 days and maintain the Threshold Amount (as defined below) for 90 days. Funds currently held at U.S. Bancorp Advisors are not applied to the Threshold Amount. Note that it can take up to six weeks for any external transfers to be completed.

    The offer is applicable to most non-tax-qualified investment accounts and individual retirement accounts (IRAs). The offer is not available for the following account types/products: Insurance products, annuities, 529 college savings plans, estate accounts, UTMA/UGMA, Rollover IRAs coming from an employer sponsored retirement plan, and employer sponsored retirement plans including but not limited to 401(k), profit sharing, SEP-IRA and SIMPLE IRA plans.  U.S. Bancorp Advisors in its discretion will determine whether an account type is eligible for the offer. Offer is not valid if you have received other Self-directed investing bonus offers within the past 24 months.

    If you qualify for the offer, continue to meet the Threshold Amount, your qualifying investment account will be credited a bonus in the amount described below (the “Bonus Amount”) within 5 to 7 months of account opening.  If you deposit assets into a qualified account (IRA), the Bonus Amount will be paid to the qualifying IRA as earnings.

    The Bonus Amount you receive will depend on the dollar amount of net new assets for your investment account (the “Threshold Amount”). You must maintain the Threshold Amount deposited for 90 days. If (a) you meet the other qualification requirements and (b) fund your investment account with a Threshold Amount of $1,000 to $9,999, you will qualify to receive a Bonus Amount of $50, or if you fund your investment account with a Threshold Amount of $10,000 or more, you will qualify to receive a Bonus Amount of $100.

    The Threshold Amount is defined as the total amount of eligible cash or securities received in the account minus withdrawals and transfers of cash and securities out of the account as of relevant dates. Capital gains, losses, interest, and dividends from investments will not be counted. Market fluctuation after deposit will not impact the Threshold Amount for purposes of determining qualification.  If multiple accounts are funded by a customer, the offer will be paid to the investment account with the highest Threshold Amount.  All accounts are subject to approval and applicable terms and fees. Account must be open and in good standing at the time the bonus is credited to receive the bonus.

    This offer is not transferable and should not be viewed or construed as a recommendation or solicitation to invest in a security or a particular type of security or securities account, nor should it be considered fiduciary investment advice or a suggestion that a self-directed investing account is appropriate for you or in your best interests based on your individual financial circumstances.

    Limit one bonus per customer. To qualify, you must deposit the Threshold Amount in a single qualifying account.  Assets in multiple accounts will not be aggregated for purposes of meeting the Threshold Amount.

    You understand and agree that any taxes relating to the receipt of the bonus are your responsibility. The value of the bonus you receive may constitute taxable income. U.S. Bancorp Advisors may issue an Internal Revenue Service Form 1099 (or other appropriate form) to you that reflects the value of the bonus. 

    Offer void where prohibited. U.S. Bancorp Advisors reserves the right to restrict or revoke this Bonus Offer at any time. Other terms and conditions may apply. Offer is not valid for, or available to, non-U.S. residents and Wealth Management Advisors registered with U.S. Bancorp Advisors. Certain states and local jurisdictions have laws that limit or restrict public employees from accepting items of value from vendors such as U.S. Bancorp Advisors that provide services to public institutions. Some public entities such as governments, state universities, health care organizations, etc., also have internal policies that may contain similar restrictions. If you are a public official or employee, you should determine if one of these laws or internal policies applies to you. By accepting the bonus, U.S. Bancorp Advisors assumes that you are in compliance with your jurisdiction's laws and institution's internal policies.

  4. A U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account from our affiliate, U.S. Bank, is required to be enrolled in Smart Rewards. A rate of 0.001% Annual Percentage Yield (APY) applies to accounts with balances between $0-$24,999.99. A rate of 0.005% APY applies to accounts with balances of $25,000.00 or more. Bank Smartly Checking is a tiered-rate account. Advertised rates are variable and effective as of 12/31/25. Rates in any tier are subject to change at any time before or after account opening. A minimum of $25 is required to open a U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account. All regular account opening procedures apply. Fees could reduce earnings on the account. A $12 monthly maintenance fee applies to the U.S. Bank Smartly® Checking account, which may be waived if certain requirements are met. Refer to the Consumer Pricing Information for full details on fees, waivers, and eligibility.

Start of disclosure content

Investment and insurance products and services including annuities are:
Not a deposit • Not FDIC insured • May lose value • Not bank guaranteed • Not insured by any federal government agency.

U.S. Investments is a marketing logo for U.S. Bancorp Advisors.

Start of disclosure content

For U.S. Bancorp Advisors:

U.S. Bancorp Advisors and their representatives do not provide tax or legal advice. Your tax and financial situation are unique. You should consult your tax and/or legal advisor for advice and information concerning your particular situation.

Brokerage and investment advisory products and services are offered by U.S. Bancorp Advisors, LLC, an SEC-registered broker-dealer, investment adviser, member FINRA / SIPC, and subsidiary of U.S. Bancorp and affiliate of U.S. Bank, N.A.

Insurance services are offered by USBA Insurance Services, a dba of U.S. Bancorp Advisors, having a California domicile and principal place of business at 800 N. Brand Blvd., 16th Floor, Glendale, CA 91203, CA Insurance License #6011694. Products may not be available in all states.

U.S. Bancorp Advisors is registered with the Securities and Exchange Commission as both a broker-dealer and an investment adviser. To understand how brokerage and investment advisory services and fees differ, the Client Relationship Summary and Regulation Best Interest Disclosure are available for you to review.

The Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) Rule 2267 provides for BrokerCheck to allow investors to learn about the professional background, business practices, and conduct of FINRA member firms or their brokers. To request such information, contact FINRA toll-free at 1-800‐289‐9999 or via https://brokercheck.finra.org. An investor brochure describing BrokerCheck is also available through FINRA.

Start of disclosure content

For U.S. Bank:

Equal Housing Lender. Deposit products offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC. Credit products offered by U.S. Bank National Association and subject to normal credit approval.

U.S. Bank is not responsible for and does not guarantee the products, services or performance of U.S. Bancorp Advisors, LLC.

U.S. Bank does not offer insurance products. Insurance products are available through our affiliate USBA Insurance Services.
